creator: wojciech@sychut.eu
text:
There is a mistake and a typo in 20100406 entry of /usr/src/UPDATING
file, that states: "COMPAT_IA32 has been added as an alias for
COMPAT_FREEBDS32. First of all, as I can see, it is not an alias;
it has been replaced - COMPAT_IA32 does not work. Also, there is
a typo in second kernel option: 'FREEBDS' instead of 'FREEBSD'.

Fix: 

s/added as an alias for/has been replaced with/
s/COMPAT_FREEBDS32/COMPAT_FREEBSD32/
